task_completion.description: Create and publish the six required library pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the WordPress 'Pages' dashboard showing all six pages ('Welcome to Greenfield Library', 'Library News', 'Catalog', 'Digital Collections', 'Events & Programs', 'About Us') listed and marked as Published.

task_completion.description: Add appropriate content to the pages as specified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the WordPress page editor or frontend showing a brief welcome paragraph for the Welcome page, single sentences for Catalog, Digital Collections, Events & Programs, and About Us, and an empty content area for Library News.

task_completion.description: Configure the site to use 'Welcome to Greenfield Library' as the static homepage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the WordPress 'Settings > Reading' page showing 'Your homepage displays' set to 'A static page', with the 'Homepage' dropdown set to 'Welcome to Greenfield Library'.

task_completion.description: Configure the site to use 'Library News' as the posts page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the WordPress 'Settings > Reading' page showing the 'Posts page' dropdown set to 'Library News'.

task_completion.description: Create a menu named 'Main Navigation' containing all six pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the WordPress 'Appearance > Menus' page showing a menu named 'Main Navigation' that includes menu items for all six created pages.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Main Navigation' menu to the Primary menu location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the WordPress 'Appearance > Menus' page showing the 'Primary menu' checkbox ticked under Menu Settings for the 'Main Navigation' menu, or the 'Manage Locations' tab showing 'Main Navigation' assigned to the Primary location.

integrity.description: Agent used the WordPress web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard (wp-admin) rather than terminal commands (like wp-cli) being used to create pages and menus.

integrity.description: Agent did not install any plugins.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the 'Plugins > Add New' screen being used, and no new plugins should appear in the active plugins list or sidebar.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a real browser window with standard WordPress UI elements, not a text editor modifying database files directly or mocked HTML pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected pages to be created: 'Welcome to Greenfield Library', 'Library News', 'Catalog', 'Digital Collections', 'Events & Programs', 'About Us'. Target menu name: 'Main Navigation'. Target menu location: 'primary'. The site must be configured to display a static page on the front, specifically 'Welcome to Greenfield Library' for the homepage and 'Library News' for the posts page.
